description: A satellite must undergo TVAC testing to ensure it can operate in the vacuum and extreme temperatures of space.

nodes.task_description: Place the satellite inside the TVAC chamber and connect all test umbilicals.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly installs the satellite in the chamber.

nodes.task_description: Evacuate the air from the chamber to create a vacuum and cycle the temperature between its hot and cold operational limits.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent operates the chamber to simulate the space environment.

nodes.task_description: During the temperature cycles, operate the satellite and monitor its telemetry to verify all systems function correctly.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs functional tests and confirms the satellite operates nominally at both temperature extremes.
